server.errorProduction: Server connection error. Please try again in a few moments.
server.errorDevelopment: WooCommerce server connection error. Try restarting the Local server.

auth.pendingApproval: Your account is pending approval by an administrator.
auth.invalidUsername: The username or email entered is not registered.
auth.accountRejected: Your account request has been rejected. Please contact the administrator for more information.
auth.usernameExists: This username is already registered. Please use a different username.
auth.emailExists: This email is already registered. Please use a different email or log in.
auth.invalidReferralCode: The invitation code entered is not valid. Please verify the code or leave it blank.
auth.loginError: Login error. Please try again later.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
auth.noValidToken: No valid token received from the server
auth.loginRequired: You must log in to save addresses
auth.logoutForDifferentAccount: Log out to sign in with a different account

registration.accountCreated: Registration successful. Your account is pending approval.
registration.autoApproved: Registration successful! You can now log in with your account.
registration.createError: Error creating the account. Please try again.
registration.dataVeracityRequired: You must confirm that your data is truthful and legitimate.
registration.termsRequired: You must accept the terms and conditions to continue.

passwordReset.emailNotRegistered: The email address is not registered in the system.
passwordReset.tooManyRequests: You have made too many reset requests. Please wait a few minutes before trying again.

rateLimit.generic: Too many attempts, please wait a moment.

cart.stockRemoved: We updated your reservation and removed {{count}} out-of-stock item{{plural}}
cart.membershipRemoved: Removed {{count}} item{{plural}} from your reservation due to a change in your membership level
cart.maxQuantity: You have reached the maximum available quantity for this benefit
cart.outOfStock: This benefit is not currently available

address.maxReached: You have reached the maximum limit of 3 addresses
address.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this address?

catalog.nameRequired: Please enter a name for the catalog.
catalog.productsRequired: Please select at least one benefit for the catalog.
catalog.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this catalog?

checkout.insufficientFC: You don't have enough Virtual Coins to complete this order

wallet.loadError: Could not load data. Please try again later.
wallet.invalidRecipient: The recipient code is not valid
wallet.insufficientBalance: You don't have enough Virtual Coins for this transfer
wallet.selfTransfer: You cannot transfer Virtual Coins to yourself

referral.formatError: Incorrect format. Must have at least 1 character followed by 4 numbers.
referral.invalidCodeMessage: The invitation code is not valid. Please verify and try again.
referral.ownCode: You cannot use your own invitation code.
referral.serverError: Server connection error. Please try later.

contact.messageSent: Message sent successfully. We'll get back to you soon.

wompi.widgetNotLoaded: Wompi widget is not loaded. Reload the page.

menu.loadError: Could not load the menu. Please try again later.

network.noConnection: Could not connect to the server. Check your internet connection.
network.serverError: Internal server error. Please try later.
network.gatewayError: Server communication error. Please try later.
network.serviceUnavailable: Service temporarily unavailable. Please try later.
